title: BIOSYNTHESIS OF ISOPRENOID FROM AMINO ACID IN HIGHER PLANT. INCORPORATION OF <scp>l</scp>-VALINE INTO LINALOOL
author_string: Suga, Takayuki, Hirata, Toshifumi, Tange, Keiji
abstract:
Abstract
               l-[U-14C]Valine was incorporated into linalool (I) in cinnamomum Camphora Sieb. var. linalooliferum Fujita with 0.0055% at the highest value. The labeling pattern indicated that some of 3,3-dimethylallyl pyrophosphates originate from valine via an alternative route rather than through the mevalonoid pathway.
